options.name: --global
options.description: Applies the profile globally, instead of the current repository

arguments.name: PROFILE
arguments.description: The Git profile to activate or deactivate

options.name: --global
options.description: Applies the profile globally, instead of the current repository

arguments.name: PROFILE
arguments.description: The Git profile to activate or deactivate

commands.name: profile
commands.description: Commands for working with Git profiles

options.name: --from
options.description: An existing profile to base the new profile on (essentially duplicates the existing profile)

options.name: --non-interactive
options.description: Do not prompt for user input or confirmations

commands.name: edit
commands.description: Edit an existing profile to add or remove configuration items

options.name: --rm
options.description: Removes the given configuration item from the profile, instead of adding it

arguments.name: NAME
arguments.description: The profile to add a new configuration to. Will be created if it does not exist

arguments.name: CONFIG
arguments.description: The config value to add to the profile, separated by an '=' symbol

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export a saved profile to a command file

arguments.name: FILE
arguments.description: The path to export the profile to

commands.name: import
commands.description: Import a new profile from a command file or existing config

options.name: --profile-name
options.description: Name of the profile to create. Defaults to the input file name

options.name: --from-config
options.description: Read commands from config, rather than command file

arguments.name: FILE
arguments.description: A file of git commands to create a profile from

commands.name: show
commands.description: Show configuration from a saved profile
